interview_focus.question: Walk me through the most complex LLM/RAG system you designed. What retrieval architecture did you choose and why?

interview_focus.question: Tell me about a time you pushed back on a product requirement due to technical constraints. What happened?

interview_focus.question: How do you measure success for an AI feature after it ships?
interview_focus.what_to_listen_for: Specific metrics (precision, recall, latency, engagement), A/B testing, evaluation frameworks like RAGAS

interview_focus.question: Describe your approach to fine-tuning vs. RAG for a new use case. How do you decide?
interview_focus.what_to_listen_for: Systematic thinking, tradeoff awareness (cost, latency, data requirements), real examples from their work
